CVE-2024-45751.title: tgt (aka Linux target framework) before 1.0.93 attempts to achiev ...
CVE-2024-45751.description: tgt (aka Linux target framework) before 1.0.93 attempts to achieve entropy by calling rand without srand. The PRNG seed is always 1, and thus the sequence of challenges is always identical.
